Music: Upbeat, slightly mysterious electronic background music with driving beat
Shot style: iPhone UGC real-life
Aesthetic taste: Bright natural window light from camera right creates dimensional modeling on face, gentle shadow on left side. Warm, natural color grade with clean skin tones.
